name: abx
description: Fast headless browser CLI for AI coding agents. Persistent Bun daemon over Playwright Chromium.
author: Edi Hasaj

scripts.build: bun build --compile src/cli.ts --outfile dist/abx && bun build src/server.ts --target bun --external playwright --external playwright-core --outfile dist/abx-server.js && bun build src/live.ts --target node --format esm --packages external --outfile dist/live.mjs && chmod +x dist/abx
